1348, 2140], "visibility": "visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 0, 1256, 10092], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": " Thanks for downloading Multiplication Memorizer!

 Multiplication Memorizer helps you memorize multiplication facts (up to the 12 × 12 times table).

 There are 5 main areas:
 1. Times Tables
 2. Quick Start
 3. Time Trials
 4. Time Records
 5. Data

 1. Times Tables
 - Displays all the multiplication facts, a "row" at a time
 - Learn at your own pace, toggling answers on/off
 - Navigate through rows using the table menu or by swiping
 - Pressing the PRACTICE button will allow you to practice only the facts of that row

 2. Quick Start
 - Takes you straight to the Practice Area
 - Gives 12 (default) or 24 randomly generated questions at a time
 - Results are saved and can be viewed in the Data Area

 3. Time Trials
 - Is the place where you can compete for the fastest times around the world
 - Gives 12 randomly generated questions for a given problem set
 - Gives a 2 second time penalty for each incorrect answer
 - Times are saved only if there are 2 or less incorrect answers
 - The top 10 times, for each set, can be viewed in the Time Records area
 - If signed in to your account, and if there are 2 or less incorrect answers, your times will be uploaded to the Leaderboards
 - Results are saved and can be viewed in the Data Area

 4. Time Records
 - Keeps track of the 10 fastest times for each row
 - Displays the rank, user initials, completion time, and date for each record

 5. Data
 - Displays results from practice and time trials sessions
 - For each multiplication fact, displays:
 	- Total questions answered correctly
 	- Total questions attempted
 	- Percentage answered correctly
 	- Grade (based on percentage answered correctly)
 - Cells display a color for each fact, indicating percent correct and grade: ", "scrollable-vertical": false, "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "8dcdbe7", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": question attempted will be very transparent, facts with 6 question attempted will be somewhat transparent, facts with 10 or more questions attempted will be fully opaque)


 More on the Practice Area…
 - Correct answers are immediately followed by the next question
 - Incorrect answers are replaced with the correct answer
 - Corrections are shown for 3 seconds (in red text)
 - Practice sessions can show 12, 13, or 24 total questions
 - Results are shown at the end of each session
 - Problems answered incorrectly are listed in the Results dialog
 - The Results dialog may display the following options:
 	- REPEAT: gives the same questions, in the same order, as the previous session
 	- SHUFFLE: gives randomly selected questions, but within the first session's limits

{"ancestors": ["android.widget.FrameLayout", "android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "com.android.internal.policy.PhoneWindow$DecorView", "bounds": [36, 84, 1404, 2392], "clickable": false, "children": [{"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.FrameLayout", "bounds": [92, 140, 1348, 2336], "clickable": false, "children": [{"text": "How to use Multiplication Memorizer", "resource-id": "com.mathdomaindevelopment.multiplicationstables:id/dia_tutorial_header", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.bu", "bounds": [92, 140, 1348, 336], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Done", "resource-id": "com.mathdomaindevelopment.multiplicationstables:id/dia_tutorial_done", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.bu", "bounds": [92, 2140, 1348, 2336], "componentLabel": "Text Button", "textButtonClass": "finish"}, {"text": " Thanks for downloading Multiplication Memorizer!

 Multiplication Memorizer helps you memorize multiplication facts (up to the 12 × 12 times table).

 There are 5 main areas:
 1. Times Tables
 2. Quick Start
 3. Time Trials
 4. Time Records
 5. Data

 1. Times Tables
 - Displays all the multiplication facts, a "row" at a time
 - Learn at your own pace, toggling answers on/off
 - Navigate through rows using the table menu or by swiping
 - Pressing the PRACTICE button will allow you to practice only the facts of that row

 2. Quick Start
 - Takes you straight to the Practice Area
 - Gives 12 (default) or 24 randomly generated questions at a time
 - Results are saved and can be viewed in the Data Area

 3. Time Trials
 - Is the place where you can compete for the fastest times around the world
 - Gives 12 randomly generated questions for a given problem set
 - Gives a 2 second time penalty for each incorrect answer
 - Times are saved only if there are 2 or less incorrect answers
 - The top 10 times, for each set, can be viewed in the Time Records area
 - If signed in to your account, and if there are 2 or less incorrect answers, your times will be uploaded to the Leaderboards
 - Results are saved and can be viewed in the Data Area

 4. Time Records
 - Keeps track of the 10 fastest times for each row
 - Displays the rank, user initials, completion time, and date for each record

 5. Data
 - Displays results from practice and time trials sessions
 - For each multiplication fact, displays:
 	- Total questions answered correctly
 	- Total questions attempted
 	- Percentage answered correctly
 	- Grade (based on percentage answered correctly)
 - Cells display a color for each fact, indicating percent correct and grade: ", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.bu", "bounds": [176, 406, 1264, 2140], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "Modal"}]}
